arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes 'struggling' joke as Arsenal's Champions League status not yet confirmed
arts.sum: Arsenal are almost guaranteed a spot in the Champions League round of 16 and a bye from the play-offs but Mikel Arteta joked he was still struggling with the permutations

arts.ttl: ‘He’s been on us’: Declan Rice shares what Mikel Arteta has constantly been telling him to improve recently
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta understandably chose to make a few changes to his Arsenal side for their relatively straight forward tie against Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions...

arts.ttl: Arsenal can ruin Man United plan to sign Matheus Cunha with clever Chelsea transfer tactic
arts.sum: The 25-year-old forward has been heavily linked with several Premier League clubs during the January transfer window following his eye-catching displays for Wolves. So, to sign Cunha, Arsenal need to make Wolves an offer they can't turn down; Sky Sports claim a bid worth £60m would be enough to tempt the West Midlands outfit into selling.

arts.ttl: Benjamin Sesko posts eight-word message after RB Leipzig masterclass amid Arsenal transfer links
arts.sum: football.london understands Arsenal have wanted to improve their forward line since the summer although it remains to be seen if a deal for Sesko can be struck between now ands the February 3 deadline. football.london understands Arsenal’s interest in Sesko has persisted from the summer when a deal was not possible before the Euros.

arts.ttl: Rice fires Arsenal into early lead against Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: Declan Rice gives Arsenal an early lead in the Champions League, as he scores within the first two minutes to put them 1-0 up against Dinamo Zagreb.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed fresh Benjamin Sesko transfer warning amid talk of £60m agreement
arts.sum: The Gunners are in the market for a new forward

arts.ttl: Kai Havertz sends timely reminder to Arsenal fans as clamour for new striker increases
arts.sum: Kai Havertz scored once and assisted another as Arsenal smashed Dinamo Zagreb on Wednesday night, as reports emerged that the Gunners are eyeing a move for Benjamin Sesko

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta to receive massive boost with Champions League guarantee within touching distance
arts.sum: Gunners are on course to seal a top eight finish in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Champions League table as it stands with Arsenal through and Man City hopes in the balance
arts.sum: Liverpool have already booked their place in the Champions League round of 16 and Arsenal are well-placed to join them, while Manchester City are at risk of being eliminated

arts.ttl: Arsenal 3-0 Dinamo Zagreb: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Champions League round of 16 qualification nears for Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at the highlights, man of the match, and stats from Wednesday's Champions League clash between Arsenal and Dinamo Zagreb.
